case_title: CLARA TEMPONGKO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-27-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT SFMTA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT JONATHAN DAT HUU LAM IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY WAIVES SERVICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT JONATHAN DAT HUU LAM. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF WOULD LIKE THE COURT TO ADDRESS THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ON THIS MATTER. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-07-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR STATUS OF SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CLARA TOMPONGKO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF CONTACTED THE COURT BY TELEPHONE ON FRIDAY 12-2-22 TO INFORM THE COURT THAT THERE WAS A FAMILY EMERGENCY AND THAT SHE WOULD NOT BE ABLE TO APPEAR FOR THE TRIAL ON 12-5-22 AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE WAS APPROVED BY JUDGE TONG. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT PAYMENT FROM DEFENDANT CCSF HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED AS AGREED TO ON 10-3-22. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
